# Offset-carrier regression: basic rectangle at 60°. Same geometry as
# basic-rectangle.txt, flag on.

polygon outer
0,0
200,0
200,150
0,150
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

set stall-angle=60
----
set stall_angle_deg=60

debug offset_carriers=true
----
debug offset_carriers=true

generate
----
total_stalls: 118

snapshot
----
